headline: Nasdaq Clears $BTC Options Listing via SEC Approval

article.title: SEC approves Nasdaq to list Bitcoin index options on the exchange
article.summary: The cash-settled, European-style contracts will trade under the ticker QBTC on Phlx, but still require CFTC approval before trading can begin.

headline: $1.26B Bitcoin ETF Outflows Spark Contrarian Buy Signal

article.title: $1.26B Bitcoin ETF outflows spark ‘contrarian’ buy signal: Santiment
article.summary: Ongoing Bitcoin ETF outflows have historically “correlated with conditions favorable for patient accumulation rather than panic," according to Santiment.

headline: Congo Ebola Outbreak Sparks $100M Aid Rush

article.title: Ebola Outruns Containment in Eastern Congo as Contact Tracing Falters
article.summary: Ebola is spreading faster than responders can track it in eastern Congo, where health workers managed to follow up with barely one in five identified contacts in a single day.

headline: US-India Trade Talks Resume Amid $10Bn Deal Pursuit

article.title: Rubio to Meet India’s Modi With Energy, Trade Ties in Focus
article.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio is set to meet with Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi, with energy security high on the agenda as the South Asian nation grapples with soaring oil prices and supply disruptions stemming from the war in Iran.
